meaning: test[医]康氏试验(梅毒絮状沉淀反应试验)
examples: If 106-year-old investor Irving Kahn, head of his own family firm, wants to keep coming to work every day, who's going to stop him?
Moreover, Mr Strauss-Kahn faces trouble at home.
Louis Kahn was one of the most talented and respected architects of our time.
Under Mr. Strauss-Kahn, the IMF promoted multiple European bailouts and we doubt that will change.
